---
name: "📚 Add a resource"
about: Suggest a reference (repo, paper, docs, course, tool, video) for an existing project
title: "[Resource] "
labels: ["resource", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Which project / theme does this help?
<!-- e.g. "RAG apps → Re-ranking pipeline" -->

## Resource link
<!-- One typed, annotated link. Type tags: 📄 paper · 📘 docs · 🎬 video · 🧑‍🏫 course · 🛠️ tool · 💻 repo -->
-

## Type
- [ ] 📄 Paper
- [ ] 📘 Docs
- [ ] 🎬 Video
- [ ] 🧑‍🏫 Course
- [ ] 🛠️ Tool
- [ ] 💻 Repo

## Why it's useful (one line)
<!-- What does it help someone actually build or understand? -->

## License (for repos)
<!-- MIT / Apache-2.0 / CC0 / non-commercial / other — so we know whether it can be adapted or only re-implemented -->

## Quality check
- [ ] It's specific and genuinely useful (not thin promo or a bare link dump)
- [ ] The link is live
- [ ] If it's a repo, the license is noted
